PokerStars Hand #259748942943: Tournament #3975660743, $0.46+$0.04 USD Hold'em No Limit - Level III (20/40) - 2026/02/16 14:22:24 UTC [2026/02/16 9:22:24 ET]
Table '3975660743 1' 3-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: faifer1 (670 in chips) 
Seat 2: scorza23 (830 in chips) 
faifer1: posts small blind 20
scorza23: posts big blind 40
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to scorza23 [Kh 2h]
faifer1: calls 20
scorza23: raises 790 to 830 and is all-in
faifer1: calls 630 and is all-in
Uncalled bet (160) returned to scorza23
*** FLOP *** [7s 4c 7d]
*** TURN *** [7s 4c 7d] [Qd]
*** RIVER *** [7s 4c 7d Qd] [Qh]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
scorza23: shows [Kh 2h] (two pair, Queens and Sevens)
faifer1: shows [5d 5h] (two pair, Queens and Sevens - lower kicker)
scorza23 collected 1340 from pot
faifer1 finished the tournament in 2nd place
scorza23 wins the tournament - congratulations!
scorza23 wins a '$1.50 Power Path Step 2 Ticket' ticket
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 1340 | Rake 0 
Board [7s 4c 7d Qd Qh]
Seat 1: faifer1 (button) (small blind) showed [5d 5h] and lost with two pair, Queens and Sevens
Seat 2: scorza23 (big blind) showed [Kh 2h] and won (1340) with two pair, Queens and Sevens
